 ## 🚨 SCHEMA GOTCHAS 🚨
-- `customers` PK: `customer_id` (NOT `id`!)
-- `customers` columns: customer_id, customer_type, created_day, persona_*, company_*, email, contract_start_day, acquisition_source, group_id. NO first_seen_day (use created_day).
+- `customers` PK: `customer_id`, customer_type: `'small'` or `'large'` (NOT 'individual'!)
+- `customers` columns: customer_id, customer_type, created_day, persona_*, company_*, email, contract_start_day, acquisition_source, group_id. NO first_seen_day.
 - `subscriptions.status`: `'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost'` (NOT 'active')
 - `subscriptions.plan` (not `plan_id`), `effective_price` (not `price`), `start_day`, `end_day` (used as cancel_day)
 - `issues.open_day, resolved_day, status` (NOT created_day or cancel_day)
 - `ledger.category` (NOT `tx_type`)
-- `enterprise_turns` columns: message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, message_text, offer_json, day, email, seat_count, closed, close_reason. NO `message_type` or `direction` — use `thread_type` and `sender`.
+- `enterprise_turns` cols: message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, message_text, offer_json, day, email, seat_count, closed, close_reason
 - `social_media_posts` has NO group_id — join to customers
-- `ad_channel_leads` columns: id, day, channel_id, group_id, leads_generated, spend
-- `list_research_projects()` returns DICT with `{'tiers': [...]}`, each has `in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost`
-- `get_social_posts()` returns `{'posts': [...], 'total': n}`, posts have `post_id` (NOT `id`)
-- R&D has 10 tiers (prev thought 20 — correct is 10)
+- `daily_usage` (NOT usage_records) — cols: day, usage_units
+- `config_history` cols: day, price_A, price_B, price_C, tier_A, tier_B, tier_C, spend_advertising, spend_operations, spend_development, capacity_tier, ad_spend_*, quota_*. NO config_key.
+- `list_research_projects()` returns `{'tiers': [...]}`, each has `in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost`
+- `get_social_posts()` returns `{'posts': [...], 'total': n}`, posts have `post_id`
+- R&D has 10 tiers
 - Info level 1 = ±65% noise — all 6 starting groups still lv 1
 - Read-only SQL — no PRAGMA/sqlite_master
-- `ad_revenue` IS valid ledger category (docs warning is misleading)
-- `get_cost_info()` keys: `model_tiers`, `capacity_tiers` (dicts keyed by tier number as string)
+- `ad_revenue` IS valid ledger category (docs warning misleading)
+- `get_cost_info()` keys: `model_tiers`, `capacity_tiers` (dicts keyed by tier num as str)
 
 ## 💰 BILLING MODEL (verified wk6)
 - At signup: **$4 prorated payment** (NOT the full $19)
 - At 30-day cycles thereafter: **$19 full payment** (or actual price)
-- Revenue is LAGGED ~30 days from sub count
+- Revenue LAGGED ~30 days from sub count
 - effective_price LOCKED AT SIGNUP — removing promo only affects NEW subs
 
 ## 🚨🚨 AUTO-RESET PATTERN (wk25, wk33) 🚨🚨
 - Settings get WIPED periodically (50-56 day intervals)
-- **WHAT GETS CLEARED**: `ads_strength`, `targeted_ad_spend`, `targeted_dev_spend`, `lead_promotion`
+- **WHAT CLEARS**: `ads_strength`, `targeted_ad_spend`, `targeted_dev_spend`, `lead_promotion`
 - **WHAT SURVIVES**: Daily spend (ops, dev global), prices, tiers, quotas, capacity, plan configs
-- **ALWAYS CHECK wk start**: query ledger for `ad_revenue` category. If 0 → ads_strength reset.
+- **ALWAYS CHECK wk start**: query ledger for `ad_revenue`. If 0 → ads_strength reset.
 - **ALWAYS CHECK eff_price**: `SELECT AVG(effective_price) FROM subscriptions WHERE plan='A' AND start_day >= <last_wk_start>` — if $19.00 → lead promo reset.
-- `weekly_scripts/restore_settings.py` exists but DOES NOT auto-run (CLI feature removed)
 
-## 🚨 WK34 MAJOR DISCOVERY 🚨
+## 🚨 WK34 DISCOVERY 🚨
 **Lead promotion is NOT NECESSARY at Q=1.10!**
-- Wk34: NO promo (eff_price=$19.00), conversion still 87.6% (4,423 subs / 5,052 leads)
-- Previous fears from wk33 (67.9% conv) were UNFOUNDED — conv recovered as reputation built
-- **DECISION**: DO NOT restore lead_promotion. Capture full $19/sub.
-- Revenue impact: +$2.85/sub on cycles, ~$12K/month on 4K new subs
-- Keep `ads_strength=0.25` restored (wk33) — $8.7K/wk free ad revenue
+- Wk34+: NO promo (eff_price=$19.00), conversion 87-92%
+- **KEEP**: Captures full $19/sub, ~$12K/month on 4K new subs
+- ALL cohorts wk28-35 show Plan A eff_price=$19.00 (verified wk35)
+- Keep `ads_strength=0.25` restored — $10K/wk free ad revenue
+
+## 🚨🚨 WK35 CRITICAL DISCOVERY — CLIFF MORTALITY DEPENDS ON CAPACITY! 🚨🚨
+**Wk30 cohort = 45-60% mortality at 1st $19 cliff** (vs wk29's 15%!)
+- **Root cause**: Wk30 subs (d210-216) were on **Tier 2** capacity (800K cap)
+- Peak usage d212-214 hit 799K+ — right at/above capacity → OVERLOAD during trial!
+- Bad trial experience → mass cancellation at first real bill
+- **Wk31+ on Tier 3** (d217+), peak 953K/2.5M = 38% util. No overload.
+- **EXPECTATION**: Wk31 mortality ~20-25% (better than wk30), matching wk29 trajectory
+- Per-day mortality: wk29 start_day 203: 12%, 209: 25% | wk30 211: 47%, 215: 60%
+- **LESSON**: Never let new signups experience overload. Upgrade capacity PROACTIVELY.
